CustomField.description: Links this Allocation to a specific Opportunity. When the Opportunity is Closed/Won, Customizable Rollups include this Allocation in the GAU's summary totals. Either Opportunity or Payment should be set, not both.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The donation this allocation applies to. Closed/Won Opportunity amounts are rolled up to the General Accounting Unit's totals.
CustomField.label: Opportunity
